Mistake.title: Mistake Record
Mistake.description: A record of a student's mistake, including AI-generated variations.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this record.

originalText.description: The OCR recognized text of the original mistake.

imageUrl.description: Base64 encoded image or URL of the mistake.

knowledgePoint.description: The core knowledge point identified by AI.

variations.description: A list of 3 generated similar problems.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created.

Variation.title: Variation Problem
Variation.description: A similar problem generated based on a knowledge point.

analysis.description: Explaining the logic and common pitfalls.
